디도서 3:1.content: Remind them to be in subjection to rulers and to authorities, to be obedient, to be ready for every good work,

디도서 3:2.content: to speak evil of no one, not to be contentious, to be gentle, showing all humility toward all men.

디도서 3:3.content: For we were also once foolish, disobedient, deceived, serving various lusts and pleasures, living in malice and envy, hateful, and hating one another.

디도서 3:4.content: But when the kindness of God our Savior and his love toward mankind appeared,

디도서 3:5.content: not by works of righteousness which we did ourselves, but according to his mercy, he saved us through the washing of regeneration and renewing by the Holy Spirit,

디도서 3:6.content: whom he poured out on us richly, through Jesus Christ our Savior;

디도서 3:7.content: that being justified by his grace, we might be made heirs according to the hope of eternal life.

디도서 3:8.content: This saying is faithful, and concerning these things I desire that you affirm confidently, so that those who have believed God may be careful to maintain good works. These things are good and profitable to men;

디도서 3:9.content: but shun foolish questionings, genealogies, strife, and disputes about the law; for they are unprofitable and vain.

디도서 3:10.content: Avoid a factious man after a first and second warning,

디도서 3:11.content: knowing that such a one is perverted and sins, being self-condemned.

디도서 3:12.content: When I send Artemas to you, or Tychicus, be diligent to come to me to Nicopolis, for I have determined to winter there.

디도서 3:13.content: Send Zenas, the lawyer, and Apollos on their journey speedily, that nothing may be lacking for them.

디도서 3:14.content: Let our people also learn to maintain good works for necessary uses, that they may not be unfruitful.

디도서 3:15.content: All who are with me greet you. Greet those who love us in faith. Grace be with you all. Amen.
